pageContext.name: Eternal Sailor Moon
pageContext.description: Your favorite characters are stylized and squashed down to adorable palm-sized proportions with lifelike eyes and simple posability.  Eternal Sailor Moon from 'Sailor Moon Cosmos' joins Figuarts mini! Standing at 3.5' tall the adorable but clumsy sailor is ready to save the world one pork bun at a time!  Don't miss your chance to add this collectible figure to your Sailor Moon collection today!
